name: Helen Peagram's Freezer Zucchini Bread Batter
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Pour batter into greased loaf pan and place in freezer for at least 24 hours before baking.
4. When ready to bake, remove from freezer and let thaw slightly.
5. Bake for approximately 1 hour or until toothpick inserted comes out clean.
6. Turn off oven and allow bread to cool completely before serving.
